Exit code 1 ...........F =================================== FAILURES =================================== ______________ TestRunDataTableRowValues.test_row_to_values_basic ______________
self = <tests.tui.test_run_table.TestRunDataTableRowValues object at 0x7fb1c9ba9e50>
def test_row_to_values_basic(self) -> None: """_row_to_values returns correct tuple for basic run.""" table = RunDataTable() row = make_run_row("12345") values = table._row_to_values(row) # Should be: run_id, status, submitted, workflow, pr, title, chks > assert len(values) == 7 E AssertionError: assert 8 == 7 E + where 8 = len(('[link=https://github.com/test/repo/actions/runs/12345]12345[/link]', '✅ Success', '03-09 14:30', 'plan-implement', '-', 'main', ...))
tests/tui/test_run_table.py:97: AssertionError =========================== short test summary info ============================ FAILED tests/tui/test_run_table.py::TestRunDataTableRowValues::test_row_to_values_basic - AssertionError: assert 8 == 7 + where 8 = len(('[link=https://github.com/test/repo/actions/runs/12345]12345[/link]', '✅ Success', '03-09 14:30', 'plan-implement', '-', 'main', ...)) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 test failure found
**Failure Summary:**
- **File:** tests/tui/test_run_table.py - **Test:** TestRunDataTableRowValues::test_row_to_values_basic - **Line:** 97 - **Error:** AssertionError - Expected 7 values but got 8
The test expects `_row_to_values()` to return 7 columns (run_id, status, submitted, workflow, pr, title, chks) but it's currently returning 8 values. This indicates a column has been added to the RunDataTable output (likely the branch name column based on the context of "Enhance Runs Tab - Branch Names, j/k Nav, Detail View").
